description:
ADAMANT is a decentralized anonymous messenger client based on the ADAMANT Blockchain

ADAMANT is a decentralized anonymous messenger client based on the ADAMANT Blockchain
Hotfix release
Emergency release v4.11.1 for a critical production bug discovered after the previous rollout.
What changed
- Shipped the critical fix set from master as a forced hotfix release
- Bumped the application version to 4.11.1 for all release artifacts
Draft Release Notes

  ↳ PRs: #944 by @adamant-al
- #945 [Task] [Mobile] Sync Android version metadata fix from master to dev
  ↳ PRs: #946 by @adamant-al
- #947 [Composite] [Bug] Send funds and crypto transfer status regressions in PWA
  ↳ PRs: #948 by @adamantmm
